context: Checkpoint 2026-06-27. Release readiness now gates package dry-run with the lightweight reference-driver smoke, keeping runtime-agent/session-tree/code-ops primitives in the publication path without provider execution.
current_tasks: release-readiness.mjs now runs reference-driver:smoke after codemod-registry and before publish-dry-run; test-release-readiness pins the ordered plan.
docs/RELEASE_ENGINE.md and docs/CONVERGENCE_FACTORY_READINESS.md record the reference-driver smoke as the lightweight readiness gate before SDK/runtime packaging.
Validation passed: pnpm run release:readiness:plan, node --test scripts/ci/test-release-readiness.mjs, git diff --check, pnpm run reference-driver:smoke, after-edit, commit, and after-commit.
next_actions: Map which npm/crates exports should carry runtime-agent/reference-driver primitives for Refarm itself before publication.
Keep pnpm run reference-driver:smoke as the cheap pre-publication signal; reserve full release:readiness for package/readiness checkpoints.
Continue daily-driver hardening without reintroducing provider-heavy or broad Rust validation unless the slice requires it.
key_decisions_active: DEC-031: host unificado refarm com renderers TUI/Web/headless sobre contratos compartilhados.
DEC-032: produto CLI/host em apps/; packages/ guardam blocos reutilizáveis.
DEC-034: artefatos WASM Rust devem ser copiados para dist/ durante build.
DEC-035: provision para, configure ainda não existe — silo é o ponto de integração.
DEC-036 [DECIDED]: refarm chat é cliente HTTP do sidecar farmhand em :42001. Não embeda farmhand.
ADR-064 [ACCEPTED]: TokenAuthError com provider + reason + rotationUrl — produzido na camada de credenciais, renderizado por qualquer superfície.
ADR-065 [ACCEPTED]: Farmhand transparent lifecycle — refarm é o single entry point. Auto-start com Y/n confirm, detached spawn, 300ms poll. LaunchDeps interface para testabilidade.
